title: Auto Replenish
description: This client-side mod automatically refills your hotbar and lets you lock important slots.
body:
# Auto Replenish

Never run out of blocks while building! This client-side mod automatically refills your hotbar and lets you lock important slots.

## What it does

**Lock hotbar slots** - Press **V** to lock a slot. It gets a golden border and won't move accidentally.

**Auto-refill** - When you use up items in a locked slot, the mod automatically grabs more from your inventory.

**Ghost items** - Empty locked slots show a transparent preview of what belongs there. Right-click to instantly refill.

## How to use

1. Put an item in your hotbar (e.g., blocks in slot 1)
2. Press **V** to lock the slot (golden border appears)
3. Use the items normally
4. The slot automatically refills from your inventory
5. Press **V** again to unlock


## Works everywhere

✅ Vanilla servers
✅ Modded servers
✅ Singleplayer

**100% client-side** - no server installation needed!

## Perfect for

- Building (keep blocks ready)
- Mining (torches always available)
- Fighting (quick food access)


**Minecraft 1.20.1 | Forge  | Client-only**
